title: Christmas Serving Set | 3 Ceramic Snack Bowls with Wooden Paddle Tray | Festive Tapas and Condiment Serving Dish
features: FESTIVE SNACK BOWLS | A set of 3 ceramic bowls shaped like a Christmas trees and a star, ideal for serving small snacks, dips, or sauces at festive meals or parties
CONVENIENT BAMBOO TRAY | The included tray features grooves to securely hold each bowl, making it easy to carry and present your treats with style
VERSATILE & PRACTICAL | Perfect for Christmas breakfasts, lunches, dinners, or casual snacking, these bowls work wonderfully for nuts, chocolates, crisps, or condiments
SAFE & DURABLE | Made from food-safe porcelain and bamboo, these bowls are designed for repeated use while adding a touch of holiday charm to your table
PERFECTLY SIZED | Christmas tree bowl: 10 x 12 x 2.5 cm, star bowl: 10 x 2.5 cm, tray: 28.5 x 11.5 x 1 cm - compact yet practical for festive serving
